title: Tender Springy Malaysian Delight Tagine
description: A cozy Malaysian dish featuring cilantro and binchotan-charcoal, perfect for a spring evening. The flavors are winey and rich, yet light and refreshing.
instructions: Heat the binchotan charcoal in a chimney starter until it is fully ignited.
Transfer the charcoal to the ceramic tagine and light it to a low heat.
Rinse 1.5 lbs of chicken breast and pat it dry with paper towels.
Add the chicken to the tagine and cook for 10 minutes on each side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
